description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal shipping container with a heavily rusted and weathered exterior, featuring a mix of dark brown and orange corrosion patterns. The container has corrugated metal paneling along its sides and top, providing structural rigidity and a classic industrial appearance. One end of the container is equipped with double doors, reinforced with vertical and horizontal metal bars and visible locking mechanisms, typical of standard freight containers. The opposite end is solid, lacking any openings or features. The top surface is flat and ribbed, suitable for stacking or supporting additional weight. The overall construction suggests durability and security, making it suitable for storage or transport of goods in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, rusted metal shipping container with corrugated sides, double doors on one end, and a flat, ribbed top. Its weathered appearance and reinforced structure suggest use for secure storage or transport.
description_view_0: End view showing the double doors with visible locking bars and heavy rust.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long, corrugated metal panels and extensive rust patterns.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, solid and featureless except for rust and panel seams.
description_view_3: Other side view, similar to view 1, with corrugated panels and rust.
attribute_handles_or_grips: integrated door handles and locking bars on front doors
